title: "Autodns"
nav_title: "Autodns"

<!-- Code generated by gen-dns-providers; DO NOT EDIT. -->

Configuration for the [Autodns](https://www.internetx.com/domains/autodns/) DNS provider.

See the [lego documentation](https://go-acme.github.io/lego/dns/autodns/) for full details.

```yaml
letsEncrypt:
  dnsProvider: "autodns"
  dnsCredentials:
    # AUTODNS_API_PASSWORD: User Password
    apiPassword: ""
    # AUTODNS_API_USER: Username
    apiUser: ""
    # AUTODNS_CONTEXT: API context (4 for production, 1 for testing. Defaults to 4)
    context: ""
    # AUTODNS_ENDPOINT: API endpoint URL, defaults to https://api.autodns.com/v1/
    endpoint: ""
    # AUTODNS_HTTP_TIMEOUT: API request timeout in seconds (Default: 30)
    httpTimeout: ""
    # AUTODNS_POLLING_INTERVAL: Time between DNS propagation check in seconds (Default: 2)
    pollingInterval: ""
    # AUTODNS_PROPAGATION_TIMEOUT: Maximum waiting time for DNS propagation in seconds (Default: 120)
    propagationTimeout: ""
    # AUTODNS_TTL: The TTL of the TXT record used for the DNS challenge in seconds (Default: 600)
    ttl: ""
```

You may also use the raw lego environment-variable names as keys instead of the normalized names.
Credentials may also be supplied directly as system environment variables, in which case `dnsCredentials` can be omitted.
